vitals.terrain: Difficult terrain with longer, steeper hills
vitals.participation_trend: High demand, Sweden's largest west coast cycling event

course_description.overview: Sweden's largest west coast cycling event featuring a challenging 140 km road course through Gothenburg area with difficult terrain including longer, steeper hills.

key_segments.name: Hilly sections
key_segments.description: Longer, steeper hills characteristic of the difficult terrain.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Challenging course rated as difficult due to extended climbs and hilly profile.

logistics.getting_there: Fly into Gothenburg Landvetter Airport or central train station; event in Gothenburg area.
logistics.accommodation: Numerous hotels and accommodations available in Gothenburg city center.
logistics.registration_details: Online registration; high demand with limited field of 5,000 riders.
logistics.bike_logistics: Standard road bike; transport via air or train to Gothenburg.
logistics.local_considerations: Coastal west coast location; check weather for typical Swedish spring conditions; collaboration with Göteborgsvarvet running event.

final_verdict.one_liner: Sweden's premier west coast gran fondo with challenging hills and large community turnout.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Recreational to experienced road cyclists seeking a hilly 140 km challenge in a major Swedish city.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for its scale as the largest west coast event and strong participant experience.
pro_tips: Register early as field sells out quickly.
Prepare for steeper hills in the terrain.
Combine with Göteborgsvarvet discount if also running.
Check preliminary date around late May.

videos.title: Göteborgsgirot / Cykellopp i Göteborg 2023
videos.description:
Gothenburg Girot / Cycle Race in Gothenburg 2023
Cycling competition, Gran Fondo - Gothenburg, Sweden 
Distance 151 KM = 94 Miles   
CRC 5-56 Stadsgirot Gothenburggirot 60KM = 38 Miles 
CRC 5-56 STADSGIROT 60 KM is an exercise race. Anyone over the age of 15 can participate.
Number of participants 2,500 Cyclists
296 km/h is the new world record with a bicycle.
A nice exercise run Cycling through all of Gothenburg neighborhoods!
.,.,.,.,.,.,.,.,.,.,.,.,.,.,.,.,
Göteborgsgirot | Cykellopp i Göteborg 2023
Cykeltävling / Gran Fondo - Göteborg, Sverige 
 Distans 151 KM = 94 Miles -
CRC 5-56 Stadsgirot Göteborgsgirot 60KM = 38 Miles -
CRC 5-56 STADSGIROT 60 KM är ett motionslopp. Alla över 15 år får delta. 
Antal deltagare 2 500 Personer -
296 km/h lyder det nya världsrekordet med Cykel.
Ett trevligt motionslopp Cykling genom Göteborgs alla stadsdelar!

OH MY GOSH on Facebook
https://www.facebook.com/Daruuosh
videos.curation_reason: Most recent race footage showing the 151km route through Gothenburg neighborhoods with substantial duration.

videos.title: Göteborgsgirot 2016
videos.description: Den 6-8 maj är det dags för den fjärde upplagan av Göteborgsgirot! Välj bland loppen Göteborgsgirot 140km, Stadsgirot 70km, Halvgirot 35km, MTB-girot 50km eller Barngirot 5km. Var med och upplev cykel när det är som bäst! Anmäl dig på www.goteborgsgirot.se

videos.title: GRAND  PRIX  Cyckellopp Avenyn Göteborg Fre 6 Maj 2016
videos.description: PRIORITET GRAND PRIX-Pemiär för Grand Prixlopp i Göteborg  Där Mölndals CK Damer Höll sig väl Framme Bland Proffsen Jeanette Arbjörk tog en fin 5:e Plats Gick i mål med segerklungan.

videos.title: GBG Girot 2014
videos.description: Hade tur två gånger. Som man ser i starten så blir jag nästan stoppad. Senare som inte syns i videon så är det en polis som stoppar alla bakom mig för att släppa iväg väntande bilister.
videos.curation_reason: First-person GoPro race footage with good duration showing race dynamics and traffic interactions.
